role: Defines the foundational documentation for the ArchSpine mirror system, encompassing its architecture, configuration, component interfaces, and operational guidelines.
responsibility: Collectively, these files establish the architectural principles, synchronization mechanisms, parameter definitions, maintenance boundaries, and lifecycle constraints that govern the mirror system's operation and ensure consistent data reflection across nodes.

children.role: Defines the architectural principles and operational boundaries of the ArchSpine mirror system.
To define the architecture and usage guidelines for the ArchSpine mirror system, ensuring consistent content synchronization across platforms.
